text:
miwi        2009-03-13 16:23:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-toolkits/fltk2   Makefile distinfo 
  Added files:
    x11-toolkits/fltk2/files patch-fltk-fltk_cairo.h 
  Log:
  - Update to r6671
  
  Add a patch to unbreak the build with current versions of graphics/cairo
  in the (non-default) WITH_FLTK_CAIRO case.
  
  PR:             132412
  Submitted by:   Thomas-Martin Seck <tmseck@web.de> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.28      +1 -2      ports/x11-toolkits/fltk2/Makefile
